div.head: 305. Editorial Note
div.p:
On November 18 the Governments of Cuba and the United States began negotiations in Habana for a Shrimp Conservation Convention applicable to the stocks of shrimp in waters of the Gulf of Mexico off the coasts of Cuba and Florida. No agreement was
reached in 1957. Documentation on the negotiations is in Department of State, Central File 611.376 for the year 1957.
